executives.name: Douglas Kirwin
executives.background: Mr. Kirwin is an independent geologist with over 45 years of international experience. He was previously Executive Vice President of Ivanhoe Mines Limited.

executives.name: Livia Mahler
executives.background: Livia Mahler has over 30 years of experience in the venture capital and investment sectors.

executives.name: Peter Meredith
executives.background: Mr. Meredith has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry and was previously the CFO of Ivanhoe Mines Ltd.

executives.name: Tom Albanese
executives.background: Former CEO of Rio Tinto and Vedanta Resources. He has extensive global mining experience.
